message:
style(supervision): continue Duration::from_mins(1) readability pass across remaining tests

Continued the from_secs(60) -> from_mins(1) replacement across 29 more
occurrences in supervision conformance tests, evidence tests,
observability tests, and supervisor builder tests. This completes the
Duration readability pass for the supervision module.
